summary: Completed testing of P0 Balance Calculation Bug Fix (iteration 86). All backend API tests pass (10/10). Frontend Daily Projection table now correctly displays backend-calculated Balance Before values. The three key fixes have been verified: 1) Using memberId instead of userId for simulated members, 2) Backend balances applied to ALL months (not just historical), 3) Cache cleared after tracker reset.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Line 1148 - handleOpenDailyProjection now uses simulatedView?.memberId instead of simulatedView?.userId
VERIFIED: Lines 1363-1406 - getDailyProjectionForSelectedMonth applies backend balances to ALL months (removed isCurrentMonth check)
VERIFIED: Line 1818 - setBackendDailyBalances({}) clears cache after tracker reset
VERIFIED: Backend /api/profit/daily-balances endpoint correctly calculates running balance including profits and commissions
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_daily_balances.py - Created new test file for daily balances API

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Daily Projection table shows correct Balance Before values)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (deposit on 2026-02-01, trades on 2026-02-03 to 2026-02-09)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Balance calculation bug is FIXED. The Daily Projection table now shows correct Balance Before values that match the backend API. Key test data: Initial deposit $5000 on Feb 1, trades on Feb 3 (+$75.50), Feb 4 (+$82), Feb 5 (-$25), resulting in final balance of $5,132.50. The backend /api/profit/daily-balances endpoint is the authoritative source for balance calculations.

verified_fixes.bug: Balance Before showing incorrect values in Daily Projection table
verified_fixes.details: Frontend now uses backend-calculated balances from /api/profit/daily-balances endpoint for ALL months

verified_fixes.bug: Simulation using wrong user ID for daily balances
verified_fixes.details: Changed simulatedView?.userId to simulatedView?.memberId in handleOpenDailyProjection (line 1148)

verified_fixes.bug: Cached balances not cleared after reset
